query: Pelagic Analytics: The Google Analytics alternative that grows your traffic. review

results.title: Plausible Analytics: Simple analytics for your website | Product Hunt
results.content:
Hello PH! 👋 Plausible Analytics launched about a year and a half ago and we're finally on Product Hunt! $3,919 MRR, more than 600 paying subscribers, removed Google Analytics from more than 3,600 websites and counted 59,351,293 pageviews in the last month. Take a look at our open stats / live demo. Here's what makes us different from Google Analytics: 🚀 Quick and simple to use with all the metrics displayed on one page 📊 Actionable and useful features such as referral and page drilldowns, and metrics such as visit duration by referral source 🤘 Lightweight script of less than 1 KB so sites load fast (45 times smaller script than the Google Analytics script) 👥 We don't use cookies and don't track personal data so you don't need to bother your visitors with the cookie/GDPR banners 🇪🇺 All the [...] 4.9

Based on 37 reviews

Review Plausible Analytics?

Reviewers mostly praise Plausible for replacing Google Analytics with a cleaner, faster setup that covers essential traffic tracking without much friction. They repeatedly highlight privacy, cookie-banner removal, bot filtering, and a simple interface that works well for personal sites, client work, static sites, and Next.js. One user says reporting is somewhat basic, and another is sharply negative about outdated documentation, weak support, and value for money. A few founders, including the makers of Breadcrumb, also cite its simplicity and privacy-first approach as influential.
